features.name: assert with clock and reset in sequential block
features.description: Code should include an assert statement inside an always @(posedge clock) block with reset condition checking for active-low reset
features.snippet: always @(posedge clock) begin if (reset) assert(~a) else $error("a != 0"); end

features.name: bind assertion module to design module
features.description: Code should include a bind statement that connects an assertion module instance to signals of a design module

features.name: module with clock reset and data ports
features.description: Code should include a module with clock, reset, and data input ports that passes them through or uses them in assertions
features.snippet: module Foo(input clock, input reset, input a, output b); assign b = a; endmodule

features.name: multiple module instances with identical asserts
features.description: Code should include two module instances that each contain identical assert statements for the same input signal
